notes: Coal Briquette mirrors the uranium→enriched-uranium pattern: refined via Refinery 7.5 m at a 10:1 compression ratio (vs uranium's 100:1), reflecting coal's much lower energy density. Ash is produced when briquettes burn in the Combustion Generator 2.5 m; its usedIn note forward-references Stone & Concrete's Cement recipe as a future fly-ash additive (real-world pozzolan). No hard dependency in v0.1 — Stone & Concrete's cement recipe is unchanged.

resources.description: Compressed coal dust bonded with pitch. Burns three times hotter than raw coal per unit. Primary fuel for the Combustion Generator 2.5 m.

Fine mineral residue left after briquettes are consumed in the Combustion Generator 2.5 m. Forward-looking: real-world fly ash is a supplementary cementitious material (pozzolan) — a future revision of Stone & Concrete's Cement recipe can optionally accept ash alongside stone powder. In v0.1 this is metadata only; the Stone & Concrete mod is not modified.
resources.producedBy: Combustion Generator 2.5 m (combustion byproduct, 1 per briquette consumed)
